name: Wheatland Tube
description: Wheatland Distributors not only provides a variety of products but also offers services that assist contractors in addressing their challenges related to wheat and other supplies.

name: Archer Daniels Midland Company
description: ADM is a leading global manufacturer that specializes in grain milling, including the production of wheat flour and wheat proteins. Their wheat gluten and proteins are highly functional, providing innovative plant-based nutrition solutions with minimal impact on flavor.

name: KWS Group
description: KWS is a leading seed producer with a strong focus on improving genetic potential through research and breeding programs. They offer a variety overview of wheat, highlighting their expertise and commitment to sustainable agricultural practices.

name: U.S. Wheat Associates - Nigeria
description: U.S. Wheat Associates (USW) is dedicated to promoting the export of high-quality wheat from the U.S., highlighting its role in both domestic and global markets.

name: General Mills
description: General Mills is a prominent player in the food industry, producing a variety of wheat-based products, including wheat flakes and flour. Their diverse offerings highlight their expertise in food production and processing.

name: Kerry
description: Kerry is a global leader in taste and nutrition solutions, offering expertise in enhancing product quality through innovative enzyme systems. They specifically highlight the benefits of brewing with wheat, rye, oats, and triticale, making them a valuable partner for those in the brewing industry.

name: BEST COAL TRADERS PVT. LTD.
description: Best Coal Traders, Pakistan, emphasizes its commitment to high-quality products and sustainable practices.

name: US FLOUR
description: US FLOUR is a specialized bulk flour supplier with over 100 years of experience, focusing on high-quality wheat products such as whole wheat, white whole wheat, vital wheat gluten, and all-purpose flour. Their commitment to quality and innovative supply chain processes ensures that their wheat flour is readily available for leading food manufacturers and bakeries.

name: Wilmar International
description: Wilmar International Limited is a prominent agribusiness group that specializes in the milling and processing of flour, among other food products. Their integrated agribusiness model ensures a comprehensive approach to the cultivation and distribution of agricultural products.

name: Ardent Mills
description: Ardent Mills specializes in flour and grain mill products, offering innovative wheat solutions like GrainWise™ Wheat Aleurone and WheatSelect® white spring whole wheat flour that enhance nutrition in food formulations.
